zh.lifeSummary: 當Janet Livingston於大約1535年出生在蘇格蘭斯林史爾卡藍德時，她的父親Sir Alexander Livingston 5th Lord Livingston of Callandar PC36歲，母親Anne Agnes Douglas of Morton31歲。她於1547年與Alexander Bruce 3rd of Airth在蘇格蘭藍納可爾結婚。他們至少是10個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1599年10月4日在蘇格蘭享年65歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Janet Livingston于大约1535年出生在苏格兰斯林史爾卡藍德时，她的父亲Sir Alexander Livingston 5th Lord Livingston of Callandar PC36岁，母亲Anne Agnes Douglas of Morton31岁。她于1547年与Alexander Bruce 3rd of Airth在苏格兰藍納可爾结婚。他们至少是10个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1599年10月4日在苏格兰享年65岁。

nameMeanings.name: Livingston
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from a place in Lothian, originally named in Middle English as Levingston. The placename derives from the Middle English personal name Leving (genitive Levinges) + Middle English, Older Scots toun ‘town, village, settlement’.
Irish: surname adopted as equivalent of Gaelic Ó Duinnshléibhe and Mac Duinnshléibhe (see Dunleavy ).

variants.name: Dunleavy
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Aidan, Connor, John Patrick, Siobhan.

Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Duinnshléibhe or Ó Duinnshléibhe ‘son of Donn Sléibhe’, a personal name composed of the elements donn ‘brown-haired man’ or ‘chieftain’ + sléibhe ‘of the mountain’, meaning ‘chieftain (literally, brown one) of the mountain’.

nameMeanings.name: Janet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a diminutive of   Jane  , already in common use in the Middle English period. It remained in use in Scotland and in some parts of England well into the 17th century and was revived at the end of the 19th century to much more widespread use, while still retaining its popularity in Scotland. Since the 1960s, however, it has rather gone out of fashion in Britain.

variants.name: Jannet
meanings: Originally a diminutive of   Jane  , already in common use in the Middle English period. It remained in use in Scotland and in some parts of England well into the 17th century and was revived at the end of the 19th century to much more widespread use, while still retaining its popularity in Scotland. Since the 1960s, however, it has rather gone out of fashion in Britain.

en.lifeSummary: When Janet Livingston was born about 1535, in Callander, Stirlingshire, Scotland, her father, Sir Alexander Livingston 5th Lord Livingston of Callandar PC, was 36 and her mother, Anne Agnes Douglas of Morton, was 31. She married Alexander Bruce 3rd of Airth in 1547, in Lanarkshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 10 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 4 October 1599, in Scotland, at the age of 65.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Janet Livingston est née environ 1535, à Callander, Stirlingshire, Écosse, son père, Sir Alexander Livingston 5th Lord Livingston of Callandar PC, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Anne Agnes Douglas of Morton, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé Alexander Bruce 3rd of Airth en 1547, à Lanarkshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 10 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 4 octobre 1599, à Écosse, à l’âge de 65 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Janet Livingston um 1535 in Callander, Stirlingshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Alexander Livingston 5th Lord Livingston of Callandar PC 36 und ihre Mutter Anne Agnes Douglas of Morton 31. Sie hat 1547 in Lanarkshire, Scotland Alexander Bruce 3rd of Airth geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 10 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 4. Oktober 1599 im Alter von 65 Jahren in Scotland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Janet Livingston è nata il circa 1535 nel Callander, Stirlingshire, Scotland, sua padre, Sir Alexander Livingston 5th Lord Livingston of Callandar PC, aveva 36 anni e sua madre, Anne Agnes Douglas of Morton, aveva 31 anni. Lei sposato Alexander Bruce 3rd of Airth nel 1547, nel Lanarkshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 10 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 4 ottobre 1599, nel Scotland, all'età di 65 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Janet Livingstonが約1535年にスコットランドスティルリングシュアイアカランダーで生まれた時，父Sir Alexander Livingston 5th Lord Livingston of Callandar PCは36歳，母Anne Agnes Douglas of Mortonは31歳であった。1547年にスコットランドラナルクシュアイアでAlexander Bruce 3rd of Airthと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも10人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1599年10月4日にスコットランドで65歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Janet Livingston(이)가 대략 1535년 스컷랜드 스티를링실르 캘랜더에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Alexander Livingston 5th Lord Livingston of Callandar PC(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Anne Agnes Douglas of Morton(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 1547년 스컷랜드 랜아르크실르에서 Alexander Bruce 3rd of Airth(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1599년 10월 4일 스컷랜드에서 65세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Janet Livingston nasceu aproximadamente 1535, em Callander, Stirlingshire, Scotland, seu pai, Sir Alexander Livingston 5th Lord Livingston of Callandar PC, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Anne Agnes Douglas of Morton, tinha 31 anos. Ela casou-se com Alexander Bruce 3rd of Airth em 1547, em Lanarkshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 10 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 4 de outubro de 1599, em Scotland, com 65 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Janet Livingston родилась около 1535 г. в местности калландир, стирлингшир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Sir Alexander Livingston 5th Lord Livingston of Callandar PC было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Anne Agnes Douglas of Morton, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Alexander Bruce 3rd of Airth в 1547 г. в местности ланаркшир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 10 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла 4 октября 1599 г. в местности Шотландия в возрасте 65 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Janet Livingston nació aproximadamente 1535, en Callander, Stirlingshire, Scotland, su papá, Sir Alexander Livingston 5th Lord Livingston of Callandar PC, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Anne Agnes Douglas of Morton, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Alexander Bruce 3rd of Airth en 1547, en Lanarkshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 10 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 4 de octubre de 1599, en Scotland, a la edad de 65 años.
